1.Name: Awakening Cell
1.Description: A cold, damp stone cell. The heavy iron door to the north has been blasted open.

2.Name: Ruined Hallway
2.Description: Flickering torches illuminate a long, blood-stained hallway. A slightly crooked painting hangs on the west wall.

99.Name: Hidden Safe Room
99.Description: You squeezed through the hole behind the painting. A shady figure sits in the corner.

3.Name: Guard Checkpoint
3.Description: A ransacked guard post. To the south, a massive portcullis blocks the way.

4.Name: Heavy Iron Gate
4.Description: You are standing past the portcullis. The path splits here. To the east, you hear the distant hum of a city. To the west, the corridor grows eerily quiet.

5.Name: Large Vestibule
5.Description: Grand marble pillars line this vast antechamber. Fresh air drifts in from the east.

6.Name: Starter City Outskirts
6.Description: You have reached the edge of civilization. The sounds of merchants and travelers fill the air. A dark, fortified path leads north, and a rickety wooden staircase leads up to a watchtower.

6u.Name: The Old Watchtower
6u.Description: The wind howls through the wooden slats of this old tower. Mats and training dummies are scattered across the floor.

7.Name: Surveillance Hub
7.Description: Banks of shattered monitors line the walls. A few screens still flicker with static, casting a pale light over the debris.

8.Name: Corrupted Server Room
8.Description: Massive data racks hum aggressively. Tangled wires pool on the floor like black veins. It smells of ozone and burnt copper.

9.Name: The Apex Enclosure (DANGER ZONE)
9.Description: The air here is heavy and toxic. Deep gouges in the reinforced steel walls suggest whatever was kept here broke out a long time ago.

98.Name: Simulated Death Trap
98.Description: The walls are covered in scorch marks and old blood. It looks like a dead end, but you notice a heavy iron grate set into the floor.

97.Name: Under the Bloody Grate
97.Description: You dropped down into a pitch-black tunnel. The air is freezing. A singular path leads further down into the abyss.

96.Name: The Dark Room
96.Description: Complete, suffocating darkness. You feel an ancient, hungry presence waiting for you to speak your devotion. The pit continues downward.

95.Name: Pit of Hell
95.Description: A true death trap. The floor gives way beneath you to an endless lake of fire.
